name: clawpod
summary: OpenClaw skill using proxy network integration
description: Automated Skill Tree audit for joinmassive/clawpod. Source category: networking-growth.

summary: Overall risk assessed as HIGH based on static repository inspection.
Repository contains outbound network request patterns that should be reviewed.
Repository references credential-like or sensitive filesystem locations.
